effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) other than from hand, Counter Charge (1), choose one of your other rear-guards in the same column, and [Stand] it.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, put this unit on the bottom of your deck. (It must be put on the bottom of your deck)
flavorTextEN: To be fully fledged is to be able to ad-lib to match our dear sister's whims.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), you may play an additional order this turn. (Increase the number of plays when activated)

nameEN: Aim to be the Strongest Idol!
effectEN:
Play this if you have five or more units with "Earnescorrect" in their different card names!
Until end of turn, all of your units with "Earnescorrect" in their card names get [Power]+5000. If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, choose one of your "Earnescorrect Leader, Clarissa", and it gets "[CONT](VC):When this unit would attack, choose three of your opponent's (VC) or (RC), and this unit battles all of the units on the chosen circles.".
flavorTextEN: Together with everyone, we'll definitely make our dreams come true!

effectEN:
(After a set order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[ACT](Order Zone)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (2)], choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets "[CONT](VC):All of your rear-guards get [Power]+5000.".
flavorTextEN: As the academic city moves forward, the entire world becomes the stage for its live.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000 for each of your cards in your order zone.
flavorTextEN: Every single note, conscientiously.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I definitely can't be late today!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When you play "Truehearted Ruby", if your vanguard is "Prismagica, Wilista", this unit gets [Power] +10000 until end of turn, and you may play an additional order this turn. (Increase the number of plays when activated)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the Order Zone, choose a face down card from your Order Zone, and you may turn it face up.
[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Song is sung, choose the same number of your rear-guards as the number of face down cards in your Order Zone, and [Stand] them. Choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn for each unit that was [Stand] by this effect.
flavorTextEN:
A little more do I want to watch
The slow dance of the fairies' waltz

effectEN: If you have three or more rear-guards, all your units being attacked get [Power]+15000 until end of that battle.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

effectEN:
Friend-[CONT](VC/RC):If you have another unit in the same column as this unit, that unit and this unit become "Friends".

effectEN:
All of this card's abilities are currently unknown.

This is the main unit of a new ride line! And featuring a new keyword, "Friends"!

• "Everlasting Sapphire" - COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Put a back row center rear-guard on the bottom of your deck], [Stand] this unit, and shuffle your deck.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a grade from 1 to 3, declare it, look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one unit card with the declared grade from among them and call it to (RC), or choose up to one Magazine card from among them and reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](VC):During your turn, if you played a Magazine order this turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: We'll be the ones making the trend from here on!♪

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Retire this unit], choose a "Lyrical ShootingStarS" from your drop, and put it into your hand.

effectEN: [ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose up to five of your normal unit rear-guards, until end of turn, they get [Power]+2000, and "[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, draw a card, and put this unit on the bottom of your deck.".  If you chose three or more rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (2)], reveal the top card of your deck, and perform one of the following according to its card type.
● Normal Unit - Put that revealed card into your hand, choose a card from your drop, call it to (RC), and that called unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn.
● Trigger Unit - Counter Charge (1), choose a card from your drop, and call it to (RC). (Return the revealed card to its original spot)
flavorTextEN: A little happiness for everyone to heal, is the type of idol I'd like to become.

effectEN: [ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose up to five of your normal unit rear-guards, until end of turn, they get [Power]+2000, and "[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, draw a card, and put this unit on the bottom of your deck.".  If you chose three or more rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: A fresh and wonderful encounter for you!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, choose one of your units in another column, and you may have it get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If you do, at the end of that battle, put this unit on the bottom of your deck.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, choose one of your units in another column, and you may have it get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If you do, at the end of that battle, put this unit on the bottom of your deck.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and all of your grade 2 or greater rear-guards get "Boost" until end of turn.

If you returned two units, choose up to one grade 3 card from your hand, and call it to an open (RC).
flavorTextEN: A dream has to be massive! Huge! Like me!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Lilfa" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn, and if it was placed during your main phase, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and draw a card.

effectEN: [AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], reveal the top seven cards of your deck, and if all of the revealed cards other than "Relation Weaver, Petrarca" have different card names, choose up to one card from among the revealed cards, call it to (RC), and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn. If you chose "Relation Weaver, Petrarca", ride it as [Stand] instead of calling to (RC), and it gets drive-1 until end of turn. Shuffle your deck. (Riding also gets [Power]+10000)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit cannot attack the vanguard, and this unit gets [Power]+10000.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :If your Order Zone has a "All Set Up!", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and call it to (RC) or discard it.
Cannonball-[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your Order Zone, draw a card.
[ACT](Order Zone):If you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Michu" in its card name, COST  [put this card into your drop], and change all of your vanguard's Cannonball abilities to "[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose three of your units, and they get [Power]+10000 until end of turn." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Sparkly and exciting.....This is the stage of my dreams!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, choose one of your units in another column, and you may have it get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If you do, at the end of that battle, put this unit on the bottom of your deck.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if "All Set Up!" is in your Order Zone, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. Then, COST  [put a Set Order from your drop on the bottom of your deck], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When you play a normal order, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

● Two or more ‐ Draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
● Four or more ‐ At the end of that battle, COST  [discard a card from hand], [Stand] this unit, and it gets drive -1 until end of turn.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your other rear-guards with different grades.
flavorTextEN: It wouldn't be wrong if I had just counted properly!

nameEN: The Rain is Like a Maiden's Heart, Riseley
effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you played a normal order this turn, this unit gets "Boost".
flavorTextEN: No~! Today's supposed to be clear for the whole day~!

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Retire this unit], choose a "Lyrical ShootingStarS" from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: The antenna as high up as usual, trying to "shine".

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit cannot attack the vanguard, and this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: For now, shall we just enjoy passing time this way?

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have a vanguard with "Mediell" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top card of your deck, put it on the top of your deck or into your soul, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Thanks for the towel~ What a heavy downpour huh.

nameEN: Flapping Sound of the Wind, Krisje
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from drop, choose one of your vanguards with "Mediell" in its card name, and that unit and this unit get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The bouncy heart floats gently.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your Order Zone has a Set Order, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: That singing voice is said to be able to wash your hesitation away.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have another back row rear-guard, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: One who heads towards the light, more straightforward than anyone else.
